title: Hat Canon
summary: Canonical hat docs belong here. Target set: - kaplan.md - miyamoto.md - meier.md - wright.md - carmack.md Each doc should contain: - context - principles - anti-patterns - examples
content:
Canonical hat docs belong here.

Target set:

- kaplan.md
- miyamoto.md
- meier.md
- wright.md
- carmack.md

Each doc should contain:

- context
- principles
- anti-patterns
- examples
- reversals and caveats
- sources

Only `kaplan.md` is canonical enough to be considered seeded right now.
